description: Horizons Patch 2 (20 November 2024) — Season 24 Winner Statues, New Boss Lairs (Undead/Heretic/Morgana), Territory Raiding Changes, Mob Combat Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Holy Staffs, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Helmets, Shoes, Capes, Battle Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season 24 Winner Statues Unveiled
sections.description: Statues honoring the winners of Season 24 are now viewable in each server's Conqueror's Hall.

sections.heading: New Boss Lairs
sections.description: Boss Lairs introduced with the Horizons update have been revamped with new layouts and visuals.
items: New Boss Lair for each faction: Undead, Heretic, Morgana
The +200% loot bonus has been removed, but now there are 3 chests instead of 1
Each Boss Lair now contains only the boss and no other mobs
Entrances in the open world have been modified slightly
sections.searchable_text: New Boss Lairs Undead Heretic Morgana 3 chests loot bonus 200% entrances open world

sections.heading: Territory Raiding Changes
items: Time until a dropped and channeled banner is destroyed: 5 minutes → 3 minutes
Raid Banners can no longer be used to raid a territory if an older Raid Banner is already active there, or if two banners are spawned simultaneously
Raid Banners that need to be destroyed first are visually distinguished on the minimap
If two Raid Banners are raised within 30 seconds of each other, one must be destroyed before the other can be used to raid
sections.searchable_text: Territory Raiding Raid Banners 5 minutes 3 minutes active destroyed minimap 30 seconds simultaneously

sections.heading: Mob Combat Changes
items: Spells and combat behavior have been updated for a number of mobs
Out-of-combat status in PvE now begins when the mob is killed, rather than when its corpse disappears
sections.searchable_text: Mob Combat Changes spells behavior out-of-combat killed corpse disappears

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Group Dynamic Encampments now award less Fame and Objective progress to players if they are solo or in very small groups
Mini roaming mob camps in the open world no longer spawn around World Bosses
Equipping food or potions now puts all spells on a 10 second cooldown
Enchantment Level 4 Treasure Resources are now more likely to unlock at Prime Time
Certain items are now less expensive to Journey Back or use a S.A.F.E. Portal with (mostly affects Randomized Dungeon Maps and Player Island furniture)
The radius of the Crystal Beetle's 'Magical Discharge' spell has been significantly increased
Hostile player count in safe regions now only counts players explicitly flagged as hostile, not unflagged players in open PvP areas
Guild Codexes can now be edited by any member with the 'Change Guild Logo' permission
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Group Dynamic Encampments Fame solo small groups World Bosses food potions spells 10 second cooldown Enchantment Level 4 Treasure Resources Prime Time Journey Back S.A.F.E. Portal Crystal Beetle Magical Discharge Hostile player count safe regions Guild Codexes Change Guild Logo

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Relentless Assault Crystal Reaper leaving area cooldowns

changes.raw_text: Relentless Assault: Leaving the area does not end the spell. Hitting enemies while outside of the area does not reduce weapon ability cooldowns.
notes: Leaving the area does not end the spell
Hitting enemies while outside of the area does not reduce weapon ability cooldowns

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sanctify Exalted Staff Cast Range 8m 10m

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Soul Link Ironroot Staff Cooldown 20s 12s Energy 18% 11% Duration 7s 5s Ally Ally Healing 100% 50% Ally Enemy redirect 30% 50% resets cooldown Circle of Life Max targets 5 10

changes.raw_text: Soul Link: Cooldown: 20s → 12s; Energy cost: 18% → 11%; Duration: 7s → 5s; Ally/ally healing shared: 100% → 50%; Ally/enemy healing redirected to ally: 30% → 50%; Casting both parts on the same target now resets its cooldown.
notes: Casting both parts on the same target now resets its cooldown

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Soul Shaker Grailseeker Area duration 3.5s 4s Multicast time window 3s 5s

changes.raw_text: Soul Shaker: Area duration: 3.5s → 4s; Multicast time window: 3s → 5s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Werewolf Transformation Bloodmoon Staff Bloody Roar lifesteal 6% 8% below 40% Werewolf abilities only Distortion Damage per tick 54 48 not reflectable Sinister Swipes Prowling Staff Range 4m 5m Spirit Bear Primal Staff Cooldown 5s 10s Tether Shift shield 200 1.5s

changes.raw_text: Bloody Roar lifesteal: 6% → 8% (while below 40% health). Lifesteal is now only triggered by Werewolf form abilities.
notes: Lifesteal is now only triggered by Werewolf form abilities

changes.raw_text: Distortion: Damage per tick: 54 → 48; No longer reflectable.
Tether Shift: Dash now applies a shield to yourself which absorbs 200 damage for 1.5s
notes: Dash now applies a shield absorbing 200 damage for 1.5s

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Ice Block Cleric Cowl Cooldown 60s 90s Removed 50% healing debuff frozen

changes.raw_text: Ice Block: Cooldown: 60s → 90s; Removed 50% healing debuff while frozen.

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where the mission 'Raise all different types of animals' could not be completed because it required an obsolete animal
Fixed issue where the mission 'Knock down another player in a Yellow Zone' could be completed by knocking down oneself with self-damaging spells
Fixed issue where Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff) could knock-up targets with forced movement immunity
Fixed issue where Phalanx Beetle and Roving Bastion dismount cooldowns were higher than intended (now 30 seconds)
Morgana Raven: Fixed issue where Reactive Scream's fear would ignore forced movement immunity

Multiple UI fixes: player count display, nametags in safe regions, gathering tooltips, chat window size, Bandit Assault countdown, Arena/Player Stats UI, Randomized Dungeon UI elements, Travel Planner improvements
Fixed issue where some mobs in the Hardcore Expedition 'Fistful of Silver' had higher resistances than intended
Fixed issue where Mists Encampments could sometimes contain mobs that did not count towards completing the quest
Fixed issue where some Resource Guardians would grant too little Fame
Fixed issue where rerolling an item's quality would sometimes incorrectly state that the player's inventory is full
Fixed issue where saved frame rate settings would not be applied immediately after starting the game
Fixed issue where the Forgotten General mob would perform a slide after its auto-attacks
Fixed issue where guild logos on the ground of Guild Islands would appear mirrored
[Mobile] Fixed issue where emotes could not be used with custom hotkeys
